text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We received a report of damaged<n>floorboards
due to deteriorating<n>infrastructure.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Have a contractor stop by and give<n>us an
estimate to fix it. Brian, can you<n>make a sign to
alert any passing<n>students? Something simple is
fine.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just so we're clear, you're not getting<n>any help
from me this time! You're a<n>vice-president too, so
try to act like one!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm looking forward to the sign,<n>Brian. As
for me, I shall head over to<n>inspect the area. We
need to know how<n>bad the damage is.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In order to properly convey to the<n>contractor the
degree of damage, we<n>need more eyes on the
ground... Hm?<n>Eyes on the... ground.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Eyes on the ground. Get it? It's<n>the floor!
Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: This isn't the time for jokes...
